data.name: Neurotensin
data.nature: Induction of cyclic nucleotide production, intracellular calcium influx, Na+K+-ATPase activation, muscle relaxation, decreased food consumption, catalepsy,decreased locomotion, hypothermia, antinociception, antipsychosis

data.incubation_time: Blood was collected before injection (day 0), and then 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, and 14 days after administration

data.name: 4A
data.chem_mod: Gln 6,14 modification, Mod = (CH3)2CHSO2-, N3-linker N-hydroxysuccinymidocarbonates containing isopropyl sulfone (1A) and N,N-dimethyl-sulfonamide (1B) modulators
data.incubation_time: Blood samples (~100 μL) were drawn from the tail vein at 8, 24, 48, 72, 120, 168, 240, 336, 432, 504, 600 and 672 h on a staggered schedule from 12 mice to give 4 replicates at each time-point
data.activity_sub: QWk 50 nmol of 4A caused significantly increased growth, with mice becoming about 25% longer than the vehicle control over the study period

data.name: 4B
data.chem_mod: Gln 6,14 modification, Mod = (CH3)2CHSO2-, N3-linker N-hydroxysuccinymidocarbonates containing N,N-dimethyl-sulfonamide (1B) modulators
data.incubation_time: Blood samples (~100 μL) were drawn from the tail vein at 8, 24, 24, 96, 168, 240, 336, 408, 504, 576, 672, 840, 1008, 1176, 1344, and 1512 h from 8 mice on a staggered schedule to give 4 replicates at each time-point
data.activity_sub: Single dose of 85 nmol of 4B showed similar growth stimulation as QD administration of [Gln6,14]CNP-38 for 3 weeks, but growth plateaued afterward

data.name: Off-target repebody-fused GLP-1
data.cter: GLP-1(7-36) (A8G) fused to the off-target repebody through linker (A(EAAAAK)3A) at C terminus
data.incubation_time: Mice were euthanized at predetermined time points (n = 5 mice each at 0.05, 0.5, 1, 3, 6, 12 and 24 h post-injection) to collect whole blood from the aorta abdominalis
data.activity_sub: C57BLKS/J lar- Leprdb/Leprdb mice (n = 5 per group, 6 weeks) were intravenously injected with the repebody-fused GLP-1 in complex with HSA, an off-target repebody-fused GLP-1, native GLP-1, and PBS. The blood glucose levels were analyzed at each time point for 24 h. The HSA-specific repebody-fused GLP-1 showed a significant decrease (**p < 0.005) in blood glucose level compared to other cases
